supervisor.role: Coordinates slices, delegates across specialist agents, and merges only after QA sign-off

architect.role: Owns pnpm/Turbo monorepo architecture, package boundaries, interfaces, and delivery sequencing

mobile_dev.role: Builds the SvelteKit + Capacitor mobile app, native integrations, auth, booking, and resilient client flows

web_dev.role: Builds the SvelteKit web UI, admin workflows, dashboard surfaces, and server-rendered experiences

backend_dev.role: Implements SvelteKit server routes, Drizzle/Postgres data access, payments, webhooks, and background workflows

qa.role: Runs monorepo validation, unit/integration/E2E checks, linting, and release readiness verification

ux_ui.role: Owns the shared design system, UI component quality, responsive behavior, and product polish
